scenes.description: FLOW GLOW finishes their performance of 'FG ROADSTER'.
FLOW GLOW MC segment and farewell.
Transition visuals for the next performance.
ReGloss performs 'アワータイムイエロー'.
scenes.song_name: アワータイムイエロー

subtitles.original: FLOW GLOW, THE SPACE TO BE
subtitles.english: FLOW GLOW, THE SPACE TO BE

subtitles.original: 今 チェイスミー
subtitles.english: Now, chase me

subtitles.original: 以上、私たち、FLOW GLOWでしたー！
subtitles.english: That was us, FLOW GLOW!

subtitles.original: こっから先も、楽しんでいこうー！
subtitles.english: Let's keep having fun from here on out!

subtitles.original: Tame the fire and fall before my justice
subtitles.english: Tame the fire and fall before my justice
